problem_title: Travel Rule message routing lacks consistency
problem_description: High-risk Travel Rule messages often remain outside structured review workflows, causing delays and manual handling by compliance teams. This disconnect increases the difficulty of tracing message status, linking originator and beneficiary data, and maintaining a clear audit trail for regulatory reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects Travel Rule message data, originator and beneficiary information, routing status, exceptions and case workflows into one structured process that supports audit trails and timely compliance review.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exceptions to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY captures Travel Rule message exceptions and routes high-risk events into reviewable cases with linked customer data and preserved audit evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond message routing. Evidence-ready Travel Rule workflows
why_sfty_description: SFTY unifies Travel Rule provider outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit evidence to support controlled review and clear compliance reporting for high-risk messages.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, routing status, exceptions, and cases into one structured compliance workflow for VASPs and regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle high-risk message routing?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes high-risk or exception messages into review cases that compliance teams can escalate, annotate, and resolve within a controlled workflow supporting audit and regulatory needs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves message histories, decision logs, exception details, and supporting data as evidence-grade records to support compliance review and audit readiness for Travel Rule operations.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into a connected workflow without requiring changes to existing messaging infrastructures.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule messaging providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but organizes and operationalizes their outputs into structured reviews, cases, exception handling and audit evidence.
final_title: Structure high-risk Travel Rule reviews with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY connects Travel Rule routing, exceptions, cases and evidence into a controlled compliance workflow.
